outputText:
SYMPTOMS & HISTORY
Ask about nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain, new dyspnea, dizziness, polyuria, thirst, fever, chills, and PO intake overnight: Nausea: No; Vomiting: Improved; Abdominal pain: Worse; PO intake overnight: Improved; Abdominal pain now 4/10; tolerating sips without emesis.
